initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS earliest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' 
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY earliest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS earliest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' 
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY earliest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS earliest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND CAST(SUBSTR(d.dob, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1990
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY earliest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    MIN(l.milliseconds) AS earliest_lap_ms
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German' 
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname
ORDER BY 
    earliest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MIN(l.milliseconds) AS earliest_lap_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1990-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY earliest_lap_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;
